title: Six Hundred and Fifty-Six

mood.label: Heavy going
mood.summary: A world at 44/100 — Russia's largest drone and missile barrage in months kills 22 in Ukrainian cities while Iran pulls away from a deal, the WMO confirms El Nino is forming, and the wars grind harder; a fragile Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire and rewilding and emissions wins keep a thin line of light.

sampleSources: Strudel default library — sampled piano, vibraphone (VCSL), RolandTR808

lines: Six hundred and fifty-six wings in the dark,
each one a question no radar could answer in time.
A child's room in Dnipro, a wall that was there,
a mother who held them through every design.
In Tehran a letter sits unsigned on a desk,
the strait still open, the deal still a draft.
Nine hundred percent more birds at a river in England —
the world breaks one thing and rebuilds the last.
Forty-four and falling, El Nino in the water,
a ceasefire made of syllables and not of steel.
We count the drones, we count the wings that came back —
heavy going, but the birds remember how to heal.
